value.claim: Cassie was in a sorority / inside that social world
value.correct_statement: Cassie is unaffiliated — never in a sorority, never inside that social world (same as Vee)

value.claim: Cassie knows she is Cassandra / the device is named or explained on-page
value.correct_statement: She does not know she is Cassandra; the device is never named, explained, or commented on by any character including herself

facts.value: The Cassandra device: sees clearly and is not believed; never named, explained, or commented on by any character including herself; she does not know she is Cassandra
Right within the available frame; Vee is right on hers; the reader holds both
Thesis-delivery vehicle at the very end ('the best sex of your life...where do I sign up?')

temporal_states.after_event: The reconciliation with Cassie at the end of the novel

relationships.relationship: comparison reference (reconciliation with Cassie may matter more than the one with Pace)
